data.title: Apple Faces Potential Delays in Foldable iPhone Launch Amid Technical Challenges
data.description: Apple's stock opened at $260 on Monday as discussions intensified regarding the impact of potential delays in the launch of a foldable iPhone on AAPL. According to NS3.AI, Nikkei Asia reported that Apple's foldable iPhone models are encountering engineering and technical difficulties, which could result in a postponed release.

data.title: Polymarket Predicts High Valuation for Genius Launch
data.description: Polymarket has forecasted a high valuation for the launch of Genius, with a 99% probability that its fully diluted valuation (FDV) will exceed $20 million on the day following its debut. According to Foresight News, the market also predicts a 97% chance of the FDV surpassing $50 million and a 96% chance of it exceeding $80 million. Currently, the trading volume in this prediction market has surpassed $900,000.

data.title: Future Market to Be Dominated by Compliant Multi-Jurisdiction CEX and Native On-Chain DEX
data.description: The future of the market is expected to be shaped by compliant multi-jurisdiction centralized exchanges (CEX) and native on-chain decentralized exchanges (DEX), with both playing complementary roles. According to PANews, these two types of exchanges will lead the way in the evolving landscape, each offering distinct functionalities that cater to different needs within the financial ecosystem. The compliant multi-jurisdiction CEX will provide regulated environments for trading, ensuring adherence to legal standards across various regions. Meanwhile, native on-chain DEX will offer decentralized platforms that prioritize transparency and user control, allowing for peer-to-peer transactions without intermediaries. Together, these exchanges will create a balanced market structure, leveraging their unique strengths to meet the diverse demands of users and investors.

data.title: ECB Rate Hike Probability Rises to 50% for April
data.description: The probability of the European Central Bank (ECB) raising interest rates in April has increased to 50%, according to recent pricing in the money markets. According to Jin10, this marks a significant rise from last Friday when the likelihood was estimated at around 20%. The shift in market expectations reflects growing anticipation of monetary policy adjustments by the ECB.

data.title: Whale Opens High-Leverage Bitcoin Short Position
data.description: A large cryptocurrency holder, identified by the address starting with 0x004, has opened a Bitcoin short position with 33x leverage. According to ChainCatcher, the average price for this position is $70,745, involving 200 BTC. The position currently shows a floating loss of 10%. Earlier today, the same address closed a previous Bitcoin short position at break-even and has now re-entered the market. This marks the fifth time this month that the address has opened a short position.

data.title: The Bank of Korea has recommended introducing a circuit breaker mechanism in the cryptocurrency market following the Bithumb trading error.
data.description: The Bank of Korea, in its latest payment and settlement report, recommended introducing a "circuit breaker mechanism" similar to that in the stock market to the local cryptocurrency market to address the risks of extreme price volatility. The report pointed out that in February, Bithumb mistakenly transferred approximately 620,000 BTC (worth about $43 billion at the time) due to an operational error, causing a short-term drop of about 15% in the BTC/KRW trading pair on the platform and resulting in losses for users. The Bank of Korea believes this incident reflects shortcomings in the internal controls and regulation of the cryptocurrency market. Furthermore, the central bank recommended that exchanges establish abnormal transaction detection and rapid suspension mechanisms and introduce relevant market protection measures in the upcoming Digital Assets Basic Law. (The Block)

data.title: Capital B Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 37 BTC
data.description: French publicly traded company Capital B has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 37 BTC, bringing its total to 2,925 BTC. According to Foresight News, this move reflects the company's ongoing strategy to expand its cryptocurrency assets. Capital B's decision to bolster its Bitcoin reserves comes amid fluctuating market conditions and growing interest in digital currencies. The company continues to monitor the market closely as it navigates the evolving landscape of cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Gate founder Dr. Han releases 13th anniversary open letter: Infrastructure capabilities will be key to future competition in the crypto industry.
data.description: On its 13th anniversary, Gate founder and CEO Dr. Han released an open letter, "Unleashing the Power of Change in Cycles," reviewing the platform's journey from early exploration to global development and systematically elaborating on its judgments of industry cycles and future trends. Dr. Han pointed out that as CeFi continues to expand into DeFi, the platform is moving from a centralized trading platform to a more open ecosystem. The crypto industry is shifting from "narrative-driven" to "infrastructure-driven," with the focus of competition shifting from products and scale to system capabilities and structural advantages. In the next cycle, platforms with infrastructure capabilities will no longer be merely market participants but will become an important part of the rules. Dr. Han stated that Gate is gradually shifting from a builder to an industry structure shaper, continuously investing in trading depth, risk control capabilities, and a global compliance system, while simultaneously deploying in areas such as RWA, TradeFi, DeFi, and AI. In addition, Gate continues to promote global brand building, accelerating its connection to a wider global user base through partnerships with top international sports IPs such as the Red Bull Racing F1 team and Inter Milan. In the future, Gate will continue to focus on infrastructure capabilities and deepen its investment in ecosystem connectivity, technological capabilities, and globalization to cope with the higher-dimensional industry competition in the next stage.

data.title: Bank of Japan Governor: Underlying Inflation Gradually Approaching Target
data.description: Bank of Japan Governor Kazuo Ueda stated that the underlying inflation rate is gradually accelerating towards the central bank's target. According to Jin10, Ueda emphasized the importance of monitoring inflation trends closely to ensure they align with the Bank of Japan's objectives. The central bank remains committed to its monetary policy framework to achieve stable price growth.

data.title: Bitcoin Needs to Surpass $76,000 to Reverse Downtrend
data.description: Bitcoin's recent performance indicates a need to break above $76,000 with significant trading volume to counteract its six-month downtrend. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency rebounded from approximately $60,000 in early February, climbing above $75,000 before encountering resistance at its downtrend line.

data.title: Pieverse Booster Token Rewards Now Available for Claiming
data.description:
Binance Wallet announced on X that participants in the Pieverse Booster activities can now claim their PIEVERSE token rewards for phases 1, 2, 3, and 4. Users are encouraged to navigate to the 'Discover' section, select 'Booster,' and then proceed to 'My Total Rewards' to access their accumulated tokens. By clicking on the 'Batch Claim' option in the upper right corner, users can efficiently collect all their rewards in one go.

This update marks the availability of token rewards for those who participated in the initial phases of the Pieverse Booster activities. The process is designed to streamline the claiming experience, allowing users to consolidate their rewards with ease. Participants who have engaged in these activities can now benefit from their involvement by accessing their earned tokens through the specified steps. This initiative is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to enhance user engagement and reward participation within its platform.

data.title: A whale transferred 2,540 ETH to Binance, incurring a loss of approximately $2.4 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address transferred 2,540 ETH to Binance after holding them for approximately three months, worth about $5.56 million. This address had previously withdrawn 2,550 ETH from Binance, worth about $8 million, representing a loss of approximately $2.4 million based on current prices.

data.title: The European Central Bank supports consolidating crypto regulation under the ESMA, aiming to unify the EU's regulatory framework.
data.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) has expressed its support for a proposal to centralize the regulatory authority for crypto assets within the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA). Headquartered in Paris, ESMA could become the unified regulatory body for crypto assets across the EU. Currently, EU crypto regulation is largely fragmented among member states, and while based on the MiCA framework, differences exist in enforcement standards and licensing procedures. This proposal aims to reduce regulatory arbitrage, improve cross-border coordination efficiency, and strengthen investor protection. According to the plan, ESMA may be responsible for regulating stablecoin issuers, supervising trading platforms, and approving related white papers, while the ECB will focus on macro-financial risk assessment. Industry insiders believe this move could reduce cross-border compliance costs, but the specific scope of authority and transition arrangements still need further clarification. (CrowdfundInsider)

data.title: Exodus CEO: Institutional investors are accelerating their entry into the crypto market, which may be entering an "institution-dominated cycle."
data.description: Exodus CEO JP Richardson stated that institutions are accelerating their entry into the crypto market this year, while retail participation has declined, suggesting the market may be entering a new institutional-driven phase. He pointed out that stablecoin market capitalization is currently at an all-time high, and traditional financial institutions are continuing to invest, including launching Bitcoin ETFs and establishing crypto-related business units. MN Fund founder Michaël van de Poppe also stated that under inflationary and cost-of-living pressures, retail funds are limited, and this cycle may be characterized by institutional dominance and a longer duration. Furthermore, CryptoQuant data shows that inflows into small accounts holding less than 1 BTC on Binance have fallen to a near nine-year low, indicating declining retail participation. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Data: The top 3 CEXs by XAU contract trading volume in the past 24 hours are Binance, Bitget, and OKX.
data.description: According to CoinGlass data, XAU is currently trading at $4717.28, down 0.56% in the last 24 hours. Possibly influenced by geopolitical tensions such as the breakdown of the first round of US-Iran negotiations, market volatility has increased. The total trading volume of XAU contracts across all exchanges reached $1.339 billion in the last 24 hours, a 504.45% increase compared to the previous period. Among centralized exchanges, liquidity is mainly concentrated on Binance, Bitget, and OKX, with 24-hour trading volumes of $644 million, $207 million, and $171 million respectively, ranking in the top three.

data.title: South Korea Warns of Crypto Market Abuse via APIs
data.description: South Korea's Financial Supervisory Service has issued a warning to consumers regarding increasing abuse in the cryptocurrency market linked to APIs. According to NS3.AI, these application programming interfaces are responsible for approximately 30% of the nation's virtual asset trading volume. The regulator highlighted that automated trading programs are being utilized to artificially inflate transactions and manipulate market conditions. In response, a consumer advisory was released, providing examples of such misconduct to raise awareness among investors.

data.title: Genius has added a refund feature to its airdrop program, supporting refund requests within 48 hours of receiving a TGE (Take-It-Your-Times) refund.
data.description: Genius announced on its X platform that it has added a "refund" function to its airdrop program based on community feedback. Users can choose to burn all their GENIUS airdrop shares within 48 hours after the TGE event in exchange for a refund of the net transaction fees charged by the platform. The refund is calculated based on net transaction fees and does not include previously distributed trading rebates or referral rewards; it only covers Genius's own fees and does not include third-party protocol fees. The platform stated that whether to hold the tokens or apply for a refund is entirely up to the user.

data.title: Oil Prices Surge Above $105 Amid U.S.-Iran Tensions
data.description: Oil prices have climbed above $105 following the breakdown of U.S.-Iran discussions in Islamabad, which has reignited concerns of potential conflict in global energy markets. According to NS3.AI, the Kobeissi Letter reported that Google search interest for 'price of oil' has reached an unprecedented level, surpassing the peaks of 2022 and 2008 by 300%.

Trump: The whole world relies on the US for oil, without needing to cross the Strait of Hormuz; 3. Binance Life's market capitalization exceeds $200 million, with a 24-hour increase of 34.16%; 4. data.title: Western Australia Considers Strategic Diesel Stockpile Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: Western Australia is evaluating the establishment of a strategic diesel stockpile to address fuel shortages impacting critical sectors like farming and mining. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the shortages have arisen due to the ongoing conflict involving Iran. The state plans to finance the fuel reserves, aiming to secure essential supplies for its industries. This initiative reflects a proactive approach to mitigate the disruptions caused by geopolitical tensions affecting global fuel availability.
